lever: Store InMemoryCache entries by CacheKey and hash canonical key bytes without allocating CacheKey::as_string() on lookup.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-cache-baseline-40ob cargo bench -p fj-cache --bench cache_baseline -- cache_lookup --sample-size 60 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

primary.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-cache-after-40ob-v2 cargo bench -p fj-cache --bench cache_baseline -- cache_lookup --sample-size 60 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

repeat.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-cache-after-40ob-v2-repeat cargo bench -p fj-cache --bench cache_baseline -- cache_lookup --sample-size 60 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1
